purpose: Tie one executable recipient init command-message transition to its claim, proof certificate, schematic trace, rendered SVG, and source-status boundaries.
positive_example: fixed upstream wire right init processed
boundaries: This bundle covers only init-family recipient command-message consumption.
Non-init recipient command messages remain rejected or blocked by source-status records.
standard-signal command-token execution remains blocked per command_semantics_gaps.
write-buffer command-token execution is implemented on recipient and self paths per command_semantics_gaps.
SJAS formal-confidence is integrated via proflog_pin.json, not blocked on missing Proflog frontier.
